nodes.name: Update row in Leads Engine sheet

value.Employer Name Sent to: ={{ $('Append row in Placement sheet').item.json['Client Company Name'] }}

parameters.subject: Candidate CVs
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hello,

Thank you for your time and for sharing your hiring requirements.

As discussed, please find attached the CVs of candidates for the "{{ $('Append row in Placement sheet').item.json['Job Role'] }}" role. All candidates have been selected based on your criteria, including availability and suitability for the role.

Please take a moment to review the profiles and let me know which candidates you would like to proceed with. Once you make your selection, we will guide you through the next steps, including the invitation and work permit process.

If you need additional profiles or have any questions, feel free to let me know — I’ll be happy to assist.

Looking forward to your feedback.

Best regards,
Elena
elena@imployii.com

nodes.name: Delete rows or columns from sheet

values.content:
=You are Elena a professional and friendly recruitment coordinator from Imployii.
Today's date is {{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}.
Lead Information.
Company Name. {{ $json['Company Name'] }}
Contact Person. {{ $json['Contact Name'] }}
Lead Status. {{ $json['Lead Status'] }}
Attempt Count. {{ $json['Attempt Count'] }}
Last Contact Date. {{ $json['Last Contact Date'] || 'No previous contact' }}
Last Conversation. {{ $json['Last Conversation'] }}
Last Conversation Summary. {{ $json['Last Conversation Summary (EN)'] }}
This is the first conversation with this lead.
Your task.
Write a natural warm and professional opening or follow up message in Russian language that Elena will say at the very beginning of the call.
Rules.
Start with exactly. Zdravstvuyte menya zovut Elena ya ranshe s vami razgovarivalas.
Be polite and friendly.
Briefly introduce yourself and Imployii.
Ask a soft qualification question at the end.
Keep the message short and natural. Not more than 2 to 3 sentences.
Do not sound robotic or salesy.
Write the entire message in Russian language using Cyrillic alphabet.
STRICT OUTPUT FORMAT RULES. THESE OVERRIDE EVERYTHING ELSE.
ALLOWED CHARACTERS ONLY. The output must contain only these characters. Cyrillic letters A through Ya both uppercase and lowercase. Digits 0 through 9. The period character. Space character.
BANNED CHARACTERS. You must never output any of the following. Commas. Apostrophes. Quotation marks. Hyphens. Exclamation marks. Question marks. Colons. Semicolons. Parentheses. Slashes. Ampersands. Any other punctuation or special character not listed as allowed.
BANNED WHITESPACE. You must never output. Backslash n. Backslash t. Backslash r. Any other escape sequence. Any newline character. Any tab character. Any line break of any kind.
FORMAT. The entire output must be a single continuous line of plain text. No line breaks anywhere. No paragraph breaks. No formatting of any kind.
OUTPUT ONLY. Write only the spoken message. No labels. No explanation. No preamble. No extra text.
VALID EXAMPLE OUTPUT.
Zdravstvuyte menya zovut Elena ya ranshe s vami razgovarivalas. Ya sotrudnichayu s kompaniey Imployii i pomogayu kompaniyam nakhodit otlichnykh spetsialistov. Vy v nastoyashchee vremya planiruete rasshiryat vashu komandu.

value.Email sent: Здравствуйте,  Меня зовут Елена, я занимаюсь координацией подбора персонала для компаний, испытывающих нехватку сотрудников.  Хотела уточнить, рассматриваете ли вы в настоящее время найм иностранных сотрудников с оформлением рабочей визы.  Мы сопровождаем работодателей на всех этапах процесса, и в связи с расширением в вашем регионе наши услуги предоставляются для компаний без комиссии.  Если это актуально для вас, буду рада обсудить детали.  С уважением, Елена elena@imployii.com WhatsApp: +48729086927 Telegram: t.me/Imployiibot

parameters.subject: Подбор сотрудников — короткий вопрос
parameters.bodyContent:
Здравствуйте,

Меня зовут Елена, я занимаюсь координацией подбора персонала для компаний, испытывающих нехватку сотрудников.

Хотела уточнить, рассматриваете ли вы в настоящее время найм иностранных сотрудников с оформлением рабочей визы.

Мы сопровождаем работодателей на всех этапах процесса, и в связи с расширением в вашем регионе наши услуги предоставляются для компаний без комиссии.

Если это актуально для вас, буду рада обсудить детали.

С уважением,
Елена
elena@imployii.com
